title: High Contrast Landing Page
description: A high-contrast Swiss-style minimalist design system utilizing brutalist typography and editorial layouts. Characterized by a neutral palette of off-whites, deep blacks, and monochromatic grays, this style emphasizes rhythmic patterns through stacked text 'echo' effects and asymmetrical grids. Ideal for luxury travel, architecture portfolios, high-end fashion, and premium editorial content where typography acts as the primary visual driver.
